name: §2.27 artifact declares the parent_session_id field per the contract schema
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id s --parent-session-id parent-1 --parent-cl-id cl-x --current-phase F --context-summary mid --next-action go --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("art/s.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.parent_session_id==="parent-1"?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
